title: To do list / my day
excerpt: I would love to see a ‘My Day’ feature where I can select the tasks I want to work on that day from all tasks that are assigned to me, as well as being able to add ad hoc tasks that aren’t linked to a bigger project (sim…

posts.author: kmartin (katie.hook@)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see a ‘My Day’ feature where I can select the tasks I want to work on that day from all tasks that are assigned to me, as well as being able to add ad hoc tasks that aren’t linked to a bigger project (similar to the Microsoft To Do app).

I use ‘My Work’ to see tasks that are due in the near future and I have a private space with a ‘To do’ board where I keep ad hoc tasks. I currently either copy tasks I want to do each day to my to do board so that I can plan my work day or copy tasks to Microsoft To Do (neither of which are an effective use of time) or use a hand-written day plan (not the best when working hybrid).
